name: MIM-104 Patriot PAC-3 MSE
description: America's premier ground-based air and missile defense system. PAC-3 MSE interceptors use hit-to-kill technology against tactical ballistic missiles, cruise missiles, and aircraft.

specialAbilities.name: Hit-to-Kill Intercept
specialAbilities.description: PAC-3 MSE uses kinetic energy impact to destroy incoming ballistic missiles, ensuring complete warhead neutralization.

specialAbilities.name: IBCS Network Integration
specialAbilities.description: Integrated Battle Command System links with other sensors and shooters for joint engagement capability.
